_meta.notes: 60-70% bin is severely over-confident: only 16.7% actual win rate vs 65% predicted. Corrected via D5 audit. Update this map periodically from HF space evaluation results.

bin_notes.bin_6: 60-70% bucket: raw 0.65 -> calibrated 0.35 (D5: only 16.7% actual win rate in this bucket)
bin_notes.bin_8: 80-90% bucket: raw 0.85 -> calibrated 0.80 (slight over-confidence, minor correction)
bin_notes.bin_9: 90-100% bucket: raw 0.95 -> calibrated 0.92 (small correction, low sample size)
